title: CoachingProfile
description: Per-Staff coaching satellite. A CoachingProfile marks its parent Staff as an active Coach with sport-specific expertise. Carries tenant_id (CASCADE) + staff_id (RESTRICT — profile hard-delete blocks Staff hard-delete; deactivation cascades from Staff offboarding via hook) + branch_id (RESTRICT — coach's primary branch) + primary_sport_id (RESTRICT + nullable — reference to sports_registry.sports). Cascades organization + region through Branch → Tenant; application through Tenant. NEVER carries application_id, organization_id, region_id, or scope_node_id.

staff_id.description: The parent Staff. RESTRICT — cannot hard-delete a Staff while a coaching profile references it. IMMUTABLE post-create.

branch_id.description: Coach's primary branch. RESTRICT — branch archive is refused.

primary_sport_id.description: Primary sport reference in sports_registry.sports. RESTRICT. NULL when the coach's primary sport isn't declared (e.g. general fitness).

coaching_since_year.description: Year the coach started coaching (1900..current year).

bio.description: Coach-authored biography. Confidential-tier. Rendered on public directory (coaching_public_directory entitlement).

photo_url_signed.description: Signed HTTPS S3 URL to the coach's photo. Confidential-tier.

availability.description: Day-of-week availability map. Example: { monday: [{start_hhmm: '09:00', end_hhmm: '12:00'}], ... }. Strict validation configurable.

hourly_rate_cents.description: Reference hourly rate in cents. Regulated_financial-tier; NEVER surfaces on platform-admin reads. Payroll writeback is out-of-scope.

rate_currency.description: ISO 4217 currency for hourly_rate_cents. Both-or-neither invariant with hourly_rate_cents.

specializations.description: Array of specialization slugs from the specializations-catalog.

is_accepting_new_athletes.description: Whether the coach accepts new athletes. Feeds customer-facing coach picker.

max_athletes_per_session.description: Optional cap on athletes per session for this coach.

verified_by_admin_at.description: When set, admin has verified the profile. Coach may accept assignments.

verified_by_admin_user_id.description: Admin User who verified. SET NULL for audit-trail preservation.

is_active.description: Master toggle. When false, no new assignments accepted; existing assignments cascade-cancelled.

metadata.description: Freeform metadata. Reserved keys: on_leave, notify_on_rating.

indexes.name: coaching_profiles_staff_unique
indexes.description: One live coaching profile per Staff.

x-invariants: One live row per (tenant_id, staff_id) — enforced by partial unique index
tenant_id is IMMUTABLE post-create — enforced by observer defense-in-depth
hourly_rate_cents XOR rate_currency both-or-neither — enforced by observer + valid_hourly_rate_currency_pair rule
primary_sport_id references an is_active=true row in sports_registry.sports — enforced by observer + valid_primary_sport rule
photo_url_signed matches HTTPS S3 pattern when set — enforced by observer + valid_photo_url rule
specializations entries drawn from specializations-catalog — enforced by observer + valid_specializations_shape rule
languages_spoken entries are ISO 639-1 two-letter codes — enforced by observer + valid_languages rule
coaching_since_year in 1900..current year — enforced by observer + valid_coaching_since_year rule
Assignment creation refused when profile.is_active=false OR verified_by_admin_at IS NULL — cross-observer invariant
Slot cap: count(is_active=true) <= tenant.coaching_profile_slot entitlement (Small=10 / Medium=100 / Enterprise=unlimited)
